control_system.algorithm: Deterministic nine-stage planner with closed-loop tactile/visual residual control

mujoco_model.grasp_model: Contact-gated palm/object weld constraints with captured contact transform and release before placement

innovation: Safety-critical fuse replacement benchmark with measurable XY, depth, yaw, force, and latch conditions
Five independent tactile loops that back-drive overloaded fingers
Actuator-only recovery from a seeded grasp-frame slip without directly commanding object pose
Conditional spring-return safety latch interlocked on successful keyed insertion
Paired fixed-seed open-loop versus feedback MuJoCo ablation

runnability.evidence: One-command deterministic run, no downloaded weights, quick/headless modes, validator, and generated artifacts

mujoco_depth.evidence: 15 actuators, 17 articulated/free joints, 14 named sensors with 27 channels, collision contacts, gravity, spring latch, and contact-gated constraints

task_design.evidence: Nine-stage disaster-response repair with physical disposal, keyed insertion, slip recovery, safety interlock, and explicit terminal tolerances

control.evidence: 50 Hz bounded robot-space residual control, visual feedback, five independent tactile loops, and 24 paired fixed-seed controller trials

dexterous_manipulation.evidence: Five-finger radial hand with ten independent force-limited finger joints, measured multi-finger grasping, 90-degree wrist reorientation, release, and insertion

engineering_quality.evidence: Separated MJCF/config/controller, deterministic seed, validator, structured policy/report/evaluation/trajectory artifacts, and disclosed grasp limitation

presentation.evidence: Generated 60-second demo video with task stage, progress, contact, and residual overlays plus a concise rubric map

innovation.evidence: Combines tactile dexterity, actuator-only disturbance recovery, conditional safety interlocking, paired ablation, and dataset export in one benchmark

controller_ablation.method: Paired MuJoCo robot-actuator rollouts with identical grasp-frame slips
